conventions.gap_definition: 300 K minus best retained ambient Tc

outcome_classes.name: target-state failure
outcome_classes.description: In-DAC source state is absent, weak, or off-target before pressure release

gap_update.reason: No retained Tc measured; precursor state never established

outcome_classes.next_action: Fix source-state preparation before attempting another quench
outcome_classes.does_not_mean: Does not test whether PQP retention works; not negative route evidence

outcome_classes.name: quench-trajectory failure
outcome_classes.description: Source state confirmed, valid logs, no unplanned warm excursion, but first ambient cryogenic check shows weak or absent signal

route_decisions.at_T1_multiple: hold-pending-diagnostic escalating toward activate-pivot-trigger per aggregate Rule B

gap_update.reason: No retained Tc achieved; benchmark unchanged but not confirmed

outcome_classes.next_action: Use recorded vQ trace to target decompression-rate follow-up
outcome_classes.does_not_mean: Does not by itself prove the route is impossible

outcome_classes.name: sample-state dependence
outcome_classes.description: Same node and handling class split by sample class or oxygen-history class

gap_update.arithmetic: If successful split Tc >= 131 K: gap = 300 - Tc_retained; otherwise unchanged at 149 K
gap_update.reason: Depends on whether a successful split exists

outcome_classes.next_action: Isolate sample-state classes before broadening route claims
outcome_classes.does_not_mean: Does not imply the route is purely stochastic

outcome_classes.name: cryogenic-retention weakness
outcome_classes.description: Initial retained signal exists but decays within the 77 K hold window

gap_update.arithmetic: If initial Tc >= 131 K: gap = 300 - Tc_initial (transient); otherwise unchanged at 149 K
gap_update.reason: Transient Tc may not be stable; gap figure is provisional

outcome_classes.next_action: Treat as fragile retained-state evidence, not basin evidence; investigate cryogenic stability
outcome_classes.does_not_mean: Does not mean no retained state existed; basin is narrow before warm-side stressing

outcome_classes.name: warm-side fragility
outcome_classes.description: Retained signal survives cryogenic checks but drops strongly at 160-170 K or 200 K

gap_update.arithmetic: If Tc_retained (pre-warm) >= 131 K: gap = 300 - Tc_retained; warm-side loss does not change gap
gap_update.reason: Gap measured against room temperature using cryogenic retained Tc

outcome_classes.next_action: Keep 149 K gap explicit; avoid room-temperature language; classify route as cryogenic-only
outcome_classes.does_not_mean: Does not mean route fails; warm-side fragility is expected for metastable PQP state

outcome_classes.name: retrieval-induced loss
outcome_classes.description: Pre-retrieval survival logged, but ex-DAC transport or bulk support drops after retrieval

route_decisions.at_T1_T2_solid: keep-primary (retrieval flagged as separate control problem)

gap_update.arithmetic: If in-DAC Tc >= 131 K: gap = 300 - Tc_retained (in-DAC); retrieval loss does not widen gap
gap_update.reason: In-DAC measurement is the relevant gap figure

outcome_classes.next_action: Isolate retrieval as its own control problem
outcome_classes.does_not_mean: Does not downgrade the route; retained state existed, loss is mechanical not thermodynamic

outcome_classes.name: onset-only ambiguity
outcome_classes.description: Onset signal appears but no zero-resistance crossing observed, no replicate or bulk support

gap_update.reason: Onset does not update the gap; zero-resistance only per VALD-01

outcome_classes.next_action: Repeat same fixed node under matched handling; demand higher evidence tier
outcome_classes.does_not_mean: Does not confirm PQP retention; onset is necessary but not sufficient; does not pass 131 K gate

outcome_classes.name: invalid / non-countable run
outcome_classes.description: Missing vQ trace, missing sample metadata, missing stage tags, or uncontrolled warm excursion

gap_update.reason: T0 runs are uninformative; no Tc measurement produced

outcome_classes.next_action: Troubleshoot operational issues before next run
outcome_classes.does_not_mean: Does not count as negative or positive route evidence

outcome_classes.name: headline reproduction match
outcome_classes.description: Retained ambient zero-resistance Tc >= 131 K at any node, valid logs (T1+)

gap_update.reason: Gap updated to confirmed retained Tc; guardrail: even at 151 K, gap is 149 K

next_action.at_T1: Proceed to T2 replication at successful node
next_action.at_T2: Proceed to T3 (controlled retrieval + ex-DAC characterization)
next_action.at_T3: Keep Hg1223 primary, route next work toward basin widening

outcome_classes.does_not_mean: Does not mean room-temperature superconductivity is closer; 149 K gap remains

outcome_classes.name: headline exceed
outcome_classes.description: Retained ambient zero-resistance Tc > 151 K -- unexpected, requires verification

gap_update.reason: Gap updated only after exceedance is replicated

outcome_classes.next_action: Intensive verification: repeat at same node, add Meissner, add XRD
outcome_classes.does_not_mean: Does not mean room-temperature superconductivity is achievable

outcome_classes.name: partial retention
outcome_classes.description: Retained ambient zero-resistance Tc between stable baseline (~134 K) and 131 K success gate

examples.note: PQP uplift confirmed but below gate

gap_update.reason: Partial retention updates gap but does not pass success gate

outcome_classes.next_action: Characterize partial retention; if no path to 131 K after multiple attempts, evidence for activate-pivot-trigger
outcome_classes.does_not_mean: Does not confirm 151 K benchmark; does not pass success gate; does not warrant route strengthening

outcome_classes.name: unknown / unclassified outcome
outcome_classes.description: Any outcome not matching F1-F8 or S1-S3

gap_update.reason: Unclassified outcomes are uninformative until classified

outcome_classes.next_action: Escalate to researcher for classification before updating route confidence
outcome_classes.does_not_mean: Does not mean route is stronger or weaker

rule_A.name: at_least_one_headline_match
rule_A.next_action: Proceed to T2 replication at successful node(s)

rule_B.name: all_clean_misses
rule_B.trigger: All 6 nodes produce T1 runs with no retained signal above 131 K
rule_B.next_action: Evaluate nickelate promotion per Phase 23 triggers

rule_C.name: all_T0_operational_failure
rule_C.next_action: Troubleshoot; if vQ-related, escalate to Deng-Chu group

rule_D.name: mixed_results
rule_D.trigger: Some positive, some negative, no uniform pattern
rule_D.gap_update: 300 - Tc_retained (best confirmed node if any pass 131 K) or unchanged
rule_D.next_action: Classify each node individually; look for PQ/TQ/sample-state patterns

rule_E.name: headline_exceedance
rule_E.gap_update: Do not update benchmark until exceedance replicated

pivot_trigger.trigger_condition: PQP reproduction fails: retained Tc below 131 K across all 6 Stage A nodes or retention not achieved at all (aggregate Rule B)
consequences: Fall back to stable ~134 K ambient Tc baseline
If PQP fundamentally non-reproducible: escalate to co-primary with nickelates
does_not_trigger_if: Only T0 runs produced (operational failures, not route evidence)
Mixed results with at least one node passing 131 K gate
